prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约15918→14543→14084→13431→12716，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近5年累计前移约3200名，近3年累计前移约1400 名，2025年基准位次约12716名，位次前移趋势明显；该校在广东物理类招生计划2021年82人→2022年70人→2023年71人→2024年65人→2025年71人，2026年 计划70人，较2025年减少1人，属小幅缩招，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京航空航天大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第37名，近年排名 稳定在35–37名区间，属顶尖211层次，在航空航天领域具有显著行业地位；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏正面，投档线稳步提升、入选国家卓越工程师学院、保 研率提升至27%；2026年周期内出现实验室爆炸事故（校园安全类负面事件），评价转为偏负面；抖音热度排名第61位，评价为一般，整体曝光度中等；第五轮 学科评估A-及以上学科共7个：力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、信息与通信工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、航空宇航科学与技术A-、软件工程A-，与招生专业中的航空航天类 、电子信息类、机械工程、软件工程等高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 航空航天类、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等核心专业社 会热度持续高位；广东物理类考生2021年33.8万→2026年45.6万，逐年递增，2026年较2025年增加约1.58万人（+3.6%），竞争加剧；南京航空航天大学位于江苏省南京市，在广东招生占比约3%左右（2025年广东招生约114人/全国约3581人），属跨省招生，广东考生对长三角高校认可度较高，地域偏好正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（71→70人）、广东物理类考生增加约3.6%加剧竞争、学校层次稳定且优势学科突出、2025年声誉正面但202 6年有负面事件，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次继续前移；预测最低位次约12409名，区间11909–12909名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 15918 → 14543 → 14084 → 13431 → 12716, showing a continuous forward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 5 years, the cumulative forward movement is about 3200 places, and over the past 3 years, about 1400 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12716, with a clear forward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong Physics Category was 82 in 2021 → 70 in 2022 → 71 in 2023 → 65 in 2024 → 71 in 2025, and the plan for 2026 is 70, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, which is a slight reduction, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 37th, with recent rankings stable in the 35–37 range, belonging to the top-tier 211 level, with significant industry status in the aerospace field. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly positive, with steadily increasing admission scores, selection for the National Excellent Engineer College, and a graduate school recommendation rate rising to 27%. In the 2026 cycle, a laboratory explosion accident (campus safety negative event) occurred, turning the evaluation slightly negative. Douyin popularity ranks 61st, with average evaluation and moderate overall exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, and Software Engineering A-, which highly correspond to the enrollment majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, and Software Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended) maintain high social popularity. The number of Guangdong Physics Category examinees increased from 338,000 in 2021 to 456,000 in 2026, with a year-on-year increase. In 2026, it is expected to increase by about 15,800 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, with about 3% of its enrollment from Guangdong (approximately 114 out of 3581 nationally in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangdong examinees have a high recognition of universities in the Yangtze River Delta, with a positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (71→70), the increase of about 3.6% in Guangdong Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, the stable university level with outstanding advantageous disciplines, the positive reputation in 2025 but negative events in 2026, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025, with rankings continuing to move forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12409, with a range of 11909–12909.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Aerospace (including Aircraft Design and Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Information
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation/Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering
- Aircraft Airworthiness Technology
- Information Security.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Vehicle Engineering
- Biomedical Engineering
- Nuclear Engineering
- Transportation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11909–12909, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 11900), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Aerospace and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 12900), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2025年历史类最低位次约4461名（仅有2025年数据，2021–2024年该校在广东历史类无招生记录），2025年为基准位次；该校在广东历史类招生 计划2025年4人，2026年计划6人，较2025年扩招2人（+50%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有显著缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京航空航天大学为211工程、双一流建设高校， 软科排名第37名，属顶尖211层次，但该校以理工科见长，历史类招生专业较少（仅英语、广播电视学、金融学），文科吸引力相对有限；2025年声誉偏正面（ 投档线提升、卓越工程师学院等），2026年出现实验室爆炸负面事件；抖音热度排名第61位（一般），整体曝光度中等；该校A-及以上学科均为工科，与历史类 招生专业（英语、广播。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业中，金融学属金融/财经/经济类（分化观望 ），英语属外语类（一般观望），广播电视学属新闻传播类（明显劝退），整体专业热度偏低；广东历史类考生2021年26.9万→2026年32.6万，2026年较2025年增加约3.4万人（+1 1.6%），竞争显著加剧；南京航空航天大学位于江苏南京，在广东历史类招生极少（2025年仅4人），属跨省招生，广东考生对 长三角高校认可度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年历史类大幅扩招（4→6人，+50%）对位次的后移压力、广东历史类考生增加约11.6%对竞争的加剧效应、以及该校文科专业热 度偏低等因素，扩招效应大于考生增加效应，预计位次较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约5499名，区间4999–5999名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category is approximately 4461 (only 2025 data available; from 2021 to 2024, the university had no enrollment records in Guangdong for History Category). 2025 serves as the baseline ranking. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong is 4 students in 2025 and 6 students in 2026, an increase of 2 students (+50%) compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, which notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 37th by Soft Science, belonging to the top-tier 211 level. However, the university is strong in science and engineering, with few majors in History Category (only English, Radio and Television, and Finance), making its appeal in liberal arts relatively limited. In 2025, its reputation is generally positive (improved admission scores, establishment of the Outstanding Engineer Academy, etc.), but in 2026, a negative incident involving a laboratory explosion occurred. Its Douyin popularity ranks 61st (average), with moderate overall exposure. All A- and above disciplines are engineering, unrelated to the History Category majors (English, Radio and Television, Finance).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the History Category majors, Finance belongs to the Finance/Economics category (divided and wait-and-see), English belongs to the Foreign Language category (generally wait-and-see), and Radio and Television belongs to the Journalism and Communication category (clearly discouraged). Overall, the popularity of these majors is low. The number of History Category examinees in Guangdong increased from 269,000 in 2021 to 326,000 in 2026, an increase of approximately 34,000 (+11.6%) in 2026 compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and enrolls very few students in Guangdong for History Category (only 4 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangdong examinees have a relatively high recognition of universities in the Yangtze River Delta.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion in History Category in 2026 (from 4 to 6 students, +50%) which puts downward pressure on rankings, the increase of approximately 11.6% in Guangdong History Category examinees which intensifies competition, and the relatively low popularity of the university's liberal arts majors, the expansion effect outweighs the examinee increase effect. It is expected that the ranking will notably drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5499, with a range of 4999 to 5999.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Radio and Television.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only 3 majors in History Category, with rankings within the predicted range of 4999–5999. It is recommended to aim for Finance as Tier 1, English as the main Tier 2, and Radio and Television as a safety Tier 3. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 5000), focus on Finance. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 6000), use Radio and Television as a safety option.
